stemHtml: A flight crew is trying to minimise a delay. After having fully lined up on the runway, they release the brakes before setting take-off thrust. What will happen to the TOD and ASD?

options.a: Both TOD and ASD will increase.
options.b: Both TOD and ASD will decrease.
options.c: TOD will increase and ASD will decrease.
options.d: TOD will decrease and ASD will increase.
